title: Checkbox multi-select in WorkForms
excerpt: I’d love to have a checkbox-select view on my WorkForm (equivalent to SurveyMonkey checkboxes) which feeds into the dropdown column. Currently the only view possible is multi-select, which looks like a normal monday drop…

posts.author: movement_monday (Matthew Mecca)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to have a checkbox-select view on my WorkForm (equivalent to SurveyMonkey checkboxes) which feeds into the dropdown column. Currently the only view possible is multi-select, which looks like a normal monday dropdown column. I want my users to see all of the available options and select from them, rather than having to scroll through a list of dropdown options.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @movement_monday

Nachliel from (Easyapps)[https://www.easyappshq.com/] here

Our our monday.com app Easyform can show the dropdown column as checkbox’s as you can see below with the “Subscribe to newsletters” column in the form:

Read more about adjusting you dropdown column in our (comprehensive documentation site.)[https://docs.easyappshq.com/easyform/field-settings/dropdown-column-display-modes]

You can contact us at support@easyappshq.com, and we also provide (free training sessions)[Calendly - Easyform for monday.com] if you need one.

Nachliel

posts.author: elizabeth.l (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. The current set-up is a very poor UI.

posts.author: reclaimed (Marianne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like this option too - without paying $300 a year for this feature.

The checkbox approach and multiple choice selection similar to Google Forms please!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love an update from Monday.com on this! I’m currently working on a large global survey for a client, but since the standard table layout isn’t available, I’ve had to explore competitor products. I believe developing this feature would be a fantastic way for companies to collaborate with a broader audience while also showcasing Monday.com’s offerings.

Hoping for more votes to get a response on whether this could be added to the roadmap as a native feature! Below is an example of the box/table layout I’m referring to—single dropdowns aren’t as user-friendly and may reduce engagement.

Thanks for reading, and I truly appreciate any upvotes!

image731×865 65.5 KB
